sentences: <ENT_008> can only predict a fixed number of N objects in a single pass.
For the <ENT_057> dataset <REF_048>, the value of N is set to 100 as this dataset has 80 classes.
This network does not need <ENT_013> to remove redundant predictions as it uses bipartite matching loss with parallel decoding <REF_090>.
In comparison, previous studies used <ENT_068>-based autoregressive decoding <REF_091>.
The <ENT_008> network has several challenges, such as slow training convergence and performance drops for small objects.
To address these challenges, modifications have been made to the <ENT_008> network.
Despite its end-to-end design, <ENT_008> suffers from slow training convergence and lower accuracy for small objects.
The uniform attention initialization and lack of multi-scale features make learning precise object locations difficult.
These limitations motivated the development of several modifications aimed at improving convergence, computational efficiency, and small object detection.
